title: Lead Investment Banker at Piramal Finance

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Piramal Finance
jsonLd.description:
Piramal Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Agra. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Piramal Finance:
Piramal Finance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Piramal Finance!
